scripts.build:bin: bun build --compile src/cli/index.ts --outfile build/task && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 src/cli/index.ts --outfile build/task-linux-x64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 src/cli/index.ts --outfile build/task-linux-arm64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 src/cli/index.ts --outfile build/task-darwin-x64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 src/cli/index.ts --outfile build/task-darwin-arm64
scripts.build: bun run build:ui && bun run build:bin
